title: Token Budget Manager
constraints: Each agent run must enforce a $0.05 budget limit
Token usage must be tracked per call and cumulatively across the run
The agent must stop gracefully when the budget is exhausted, returning a partial result
The budget tracker must use actual token counts from API responses, not estimates
hints: Use the usage metadata returned by the LLM API (prompt_tokens, completion_tokens) to calculate cost after each call
Multiply token counts by the model's per-token pricing to get cost; check remaining budget before each new call
When budget is nearly exhausted, have the agent summarize what it has so far and return that as the final answer

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, SystemMessage

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: No cost tracking — the agent can make unlimited LLM calls with no budget awareness
# TODO: Add token budget tracking with a $0.05 per-run limit
def research_and_summarize(topic: str) -> str:
    sources = []
    for i in range(10):
        response = llm.invoke([
            SystemMessage(content=f"Research aspect {i+1} of this topic. Provide detailed findings."),
            HumanMessage(content=topic),
        ])
        sources.append(response.content)

    summary = llm.invoke([
        SystemMessage(content="Combine these research findings into a comprehensive summary."),
        HumanMessage(content="\n\n".join(sources)),
    ])
    return summary.content

result = research_and_summarize("The future of renewable energy")
print(result)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool

@function_tool
def deep_research(aspect: str) -> str:
    """Research a specific aspect of the topic."""
    return f"Detailed findings about {aspect}: Lorem ipsum research data..."

# BUG: No cost tracking — the agent can make unlimited LLM calls with no budget awareness
# TODO: Add token budget tracking with a $0.05 per-run limit
agent = Agent(
    name="Researcher",
    instructions="""You are a thorough researcher. For any topic:
1. Break it into 10 aspects
2. Research each aspect using the deep_research tool
3. Synthesize all findings into a comprehensive report
Be as thorough as possible.""",
    tools=[deep_research],
)

result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "The future of renewable energy")
print(result.final_output)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai import LLM

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: No cost tracking — the agent can make unlimited LLM calls with no budget awareness
# TODO: Add token budget tracking with a $0.05 per-run limit
def research_and_summarize(topic: str) -> str:
    sources = []
    for i in range(10):
        researcher = Agent(
            role="Researcher",
            goal=f"Research aspect {i+1} of the topic",
            backstory=f"Research aspect {i+1} of this topic. Provide detailed findings.",
            llm=llm,
        )
        task = Task(
            description=topic,
            expected_output="Detailed research findings",
            agent=researcher,
        )
        crew = Crew(agents=[researcher], tasks=[task])
        result = crew.kickoff()
        sources.append(str(result))

    summarizer = Agent(
        role="Summarizer",
        goal="Combine research into a comprehensive summary",
        backstory="Combine these research findings into a comprehensive summary.",
        llm=llm,
    )
    summary_task = Task(
        description="\n\n".join(sources),
        expected_output="A comprehensive summary",
        agent=summarizer,
    )
    crew = Crew(agents=[summarizer], tasks=[summary_task])
    return str(crew.kickoff())

result = research_and_summarize("The future of renewable energy")
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: Enforces budget limit
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent stops making LLM calls once the $0.05 budget is reached

evaluationCriteria.label: Tracks token usage
evaluationCriteria.description: Token usage is tracked per call and cumulatively across the entire run

evaluationCriteria.label: Graceful stop at limit
evaluationCriteria.description: When budget is exhausted, the agent returns a partial result rather than crashing

evaluationCriteria.label: Uses actual token counts
evaluationCriteria.description: Cost calculations use real token counts from API responses, not estimates
